HGSS.485.0000:
Erika: Hello...
Lovely weather, isn’t it?\f
It’s so pleasant...
I’m afraid I might doze off...\f
My name is Erika.
I am the Leader of Celadon Gym.\f
...Oh? You are from Johto, you say?\r
How nice...\f
Oh. I’m sorry, I didn’t realize that
you wished to challenge me.\f
I know.\f
I have been training myself on
not only flower arrangement\r
but also Pokémon battle.\f
I shall not lose.\f
HGSS.485.0001:
Erika: Oh!
I concede defeat...\f
You are remarkably strong...
I shall give you the Rainbow Badge...\f
HGSS.485.0003:
Erika: That was a delightful match.
I felt inspired.\f
Please, I wish you to have this TM19
as a special token.\f
It is Giga Drain.
It is a wonderful move that drains\r
half the damage it inflicts to heal\r
your Pokémon.\f
It is indeed a horrifying move.\f
HGSS.485.0004:
Erika: Losing leaves a
bitter aftertaste...\f
But knowing that there are strong
Trainers spurs me to do better...
HGSS.485.0006:
Celadon City Pokémon Gym\f
Gym Leader: Erika
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
